text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what are you so down for?! This is a super
exciting development!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're both tied, zero-zero! In other words, we're
rivals with equal prowess!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now it's a competition to see who can get one
first! Good luck!
